title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent feature available in Claude Pro and Max plans that runs on Windows and Mac to automate tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The video demonstrates file organization, email summarization, calendar scheduling, and workflow automation capabilities through a step-by-step tutorial.
